subcodes.first_line: We have beheld thy turning unto Us, whereupon We turned unto thee, and We heard thy call, whereupon We called unto thee from beyond the ocean of grandeur [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد راینا اقبالک اقبلنا الیک و سمعنا ندآئک نادیناک عن ورآء قلزم الکبریاء المقر
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @love of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @praise and encouragement
